case_title: BHAKTA, RAMAN vs. SMITH, REGGIE et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, REGGIE WATKIN, SYBIL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 41 6TH ST, #10, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL AUG-03-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEF. DOESN'T VACATE 8-3-93, JUDGMENT ENTERS FOR $1,650 RENT, $15.71 U.D. PER DIEM FROM 6-14-93 & $80 COSTS. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE DETAILS OF JUDGMENT.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, REGGIE WATKIN, SYBIL
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $15.71 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BHAKTA, RAMAN
HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY THIRD PARTY SMITH, WILLIE HEARING SET FOR AUG-11-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY THIRD PARTY SMITH, WILLIE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, CALENDAR OF AUG-11-1993, DENIED CLAIMANT AND ALL OCCUPANTS OF PREMISES ARE TO BE EVICTED WITHIN A REASONABLE TIME NOT TO EXCEED FIVE DAYS.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, REGGIE WATKIN, SYBIL

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BHAKTA, RAMAN SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-07-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 05 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUL-14-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

DEPT.#1, JUDGE HERBERT DONALDSON. C/C FOR J. TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/ATTY. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIP. W/JUDGMENT FOR PL - REST PREMISES AT 41 6TH ST, S.F, CA. - WRIT ISSUES IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 8-3-93, 5PM - ALL R&D WVD UNLESS DEF. DOESN'T VACATE & THEN $1,650 R&D, $80 COSTS & $15 PER DIEM TO 8-3-93 - MUTUAL LIABILITY WVD - ANY PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED - RENTAL AGREEMENT FORF. - PL. WILL VACATE JUDG- MENT & DISM. IF DEFS. VACATE PREMISES ON 8-3-93 & PROPER PAPERS PREPARED & DELIVERED TO PL. ATTY.
